title: EarnProtocolInfo (crawler output)
description: Superset of IEarnProtocolInfo from server-service-dashboard + Figma provider links. Entity currently has no providerWebsite/providerXLink/providerDiscordLink — they are emitted here so JSON is future-proof when the entity is extended.

slug.description: Business unique key. Per decision: equal to provider code, one per provider.

provider.description: Must match EProvider enum in server-service-earn/src/common/index.ts

establishment.description: Founding year. Required — crawler must find it.

oneLiner.description: One sentence (≤ 140 chars) on notable prior experience. Null only when nothing verifiable can be found.

status.description: Crawler output is always 'draft'. Human promotes to 'active'/'archived' via dashboard after import — those lifecycle states are NOT valid here.

fundingRounds.description: Full funding history, newest round first. If the protocol has raised Series B, Seed and Series A MUST also be present — never emit only the latest round.

date.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD when the exact day is known, otherwise YYYY-MM.

amount.description: Figma display string with currency, e.g. '$165M', '$11M'. Null when undisclosed.

valuation.description: Figma display string, e.g. '$1.66B'. Null when undisclosed.

investors.description: Participating firms/angels for this round. Empty array when undisclosed.

audits.description: Security audit history plus the crawler's own scan timestamp (document-level updatedAt is not granular enough).

items.description: One entry per audit report, newest first.

auditor.description: Audit firm name, e.g. 'Certora', 'Trail of Bits', 'OpenZeppelin', 'Spearbit'.

date.description: YYYY-MM (Figma precision) or YYYY-MM-DD when the exact date is known.

scope.description: What was audited — used to disambiguate when the same firm audited multiple times. Null if unknown.

reportUrl.description: Link to the audit report PDF/blog post.

lastScannedAt.description: UTC date the audits block was scanned. Claude may leave any YYYY-MM-DD value; run.sh overwrites this with `date -u +%Y-%m-%d` before validation.

sources.description: Non-DB audit trail: URLs Claude cited. Stripped before DB import.
